community.title: Community Contributions ↓
community.intro: Rome wasn't built in a day, and neither was San Andreas Online. We greatly appreciate the contributions of the SAMP/open.mp community, and we decided to show gratitude by sharing some of the work that shaped the SAO project. You can checkout the full list of contributors on our {0}.
